global.description: The ad features a modern blue abstract background with layered graphic elements and clear promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for smarter flying.

elements.label: blue abstract background
elements.description: A smooth blue background with abstract shapes creating a modern and clean look.

elements.label: central graphic element
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the center, possibly representing a product or service, with a subtle gradient.

elements.label: oval shape
elements.description: An oval shape overlapping the central graphic, adding depth and interest to the composition.

elements.label: rectangle shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape positioned slightly off-center, contributing to the layered design.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circle located near the top, enhancing the abstract theme of the ad.

elements.label: lower graphic element
elements.description: A small graphic element at the bottom, unclear in purpose but adds to the overall design.

elements.label: small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangle positioned in the center, possibly a placeholder or decorative element.

elements.label: brand name
elements.description: The text 'NomadLaye' in bold, large font at the top, prominently displaying the brand name.

elements.label: promotional message
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter Special fares today' in a clear, readable font, conveying the promotional offer.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Get offer' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.
